The garment undergoes a washing and softening process to remove odors, enhancing the fabric's feel and appearance. Available in sizes M-L-XL, with a loose fit.

This CHANEL milk tea-colored long-sleeved T-shirt is a perfect blend of vintage and luxury. The lazy texture of the milk tea color meets Chanel's vintage genes, creating a "vintage luxury style" interpretation. The soothing milk tea color exudes a healing vibe, making it a versatile wardrobe staple for all seasons. Made of 99% cotton, the skin-friendly fabric is soft, breathable, and comfortable to wear. The classic logo on the chest is presented in a vintage patch style, exuding a sense of refined taste. The loose fit is friendly to all body types, allowing for a casual and lazy look when worn alone, or layered under a suit or jacket to add depth and luxury details to the outfit. The exquisite stitching and solid collar craftsmanship showcase the brand's attention to detail, effortlessly elevating the overall look. Sizes available: S-M-L.

Chanel's tailored wool jacket features a classic grid pattern with a luxurious sheen, adorned with the iconic logo in silk jacquard lining. The black and white color scheme highlights a vintage silhouette, with shimmering yarns interweaving within the grid pattern for a delicate and exquisite look. The single-breasted closure resembles a row of delicate medals, exuding an elegant and luxurious charm. The jacket is meticulously crafted with exceptional texture and comfort against the skin. The geometric beauty of the neatly arranged lines, combined with the interplay of the grid pattern and shiny yarns, creates a sophisticated and glamorous appeal. The garment, embodying a fashion philosophy, is tailored with anatomical precision, utilizing traditional craftsmanship techniques such as cutting, folding, shrinking, and stretching. The meticulous workmanship, slow production process, and high material consumption reflect a respect for materials and a pursuit of tactile quality. The garment is pre-cut using template guides to ensure precise positioning, shape, and size, guaranteeing quality results. The finished garment undergoes a washing and softening process to remove odors and enhance the fabric's feel and appearance. Available in sizes 46-52 (S-XL).

CHANEL's three-wheeled clue edge market exclusive series features a simple design that exudes a high-end temperament, embodying the essence of men's T-shirts. Choose it not because of standards, but because at that moment it caught your eye. Regardless of your body shape, there is always a T-shirt that can perfectly match you, whether it's a classic or trendy style, CHANEL can meet your needs. When the sun kisses your skin, a breathable pure cotton short-sleeved shirt is the gentle answer to summer. Made from selected high-quality combed cotton, soft and skin-friendly like a cloud, each inch fits delicately, bidding farewell to heat and stickiness; high-density knitting craftsmanship ensures no pilling or deformation even after long wear, embracing every moment of life with ease. The classic round neckline enhances the neck line, the double-yarn collar ribbing is stylish and non-restrictive, easily paired with jeans or sweatpants, from commuting to camping, interpreting daily sophistication with laziness and casualness. Breathable and sweat-free, lightweight and non-restrictive, making coolness and comfort the most suitable companions for this summer. Available in black, white, light lake blue, sizes S-XL (unisex) 🔥

Chanel backpack buckle long-sleeve sweater, made of wool fabric with floral velvet trim, naturally shiny and soft to the touch. Featuring a high-end gray tone, the design is subtle and deep, with the iconic Chanel backpack buckle cleverly integrated into the shoulders like lively musical notes, injecting a luxurious soul into the minimalist silhouette. The garment fits the body contours with a lazy yet elegant posture, appearing more stable and restrained under the gray shading, creating an elegant landscape. Craftsmanship: Using seam three-dimensional stitching to create a more three-dimensional and body-hugging effect. The meticulous craftsmanship involves manual machine stitching and precise needlework at the buckle starting point, using high-quality threads and specialized sewing machines to ensure even stitching and a beautiful finish. Garment washing and softening process: Through professional washing equipment and specific detergents, the garment undergoes deep cleaning and deodorizing treatment to improve its feel and appearance. Accessories: Customized Chanel box buckle closure and Chanel logo. Fit: Slim fit. Size: Exclusive supply.
